nodes.x: TO the chief Musician, Altaschith, A Psalm [or] Song of Asaph. Unto thee, O God, do we give thanks, [unto thee] do we give thanks: for [that] thy name is near thy wondrous works declare.

» justice. To the chief Musician, Al-tagchith, A Psalm or Song of Asaph. NTO thee, 0. God; do we give thanks, unto thee do we give thanks; for that thy name is. near thy wondrous works declare... 2 When I- shall. receive the congregation I will judge uprightly. 3 The earth and all the inhabitants
When I shall receive the congregation I will judge uprightly.
The earth and all the inhabitants thereof are dissolved: I bear up the pillars of it. Selah.
I said unto the fools, Deal not foolishly: and to the wicked, Lift not up the horn:
Lift not up your horn on high: speak [not with] a stiff neck.
backs (Heb. ‘oreph) neck, back of the neck, back; of apostasy (fig.); stiff of neck, obstinate (fig.)
For promotion [cometh] neither from the east, nor from the west, nor from the south.
And I appointed him a name, from the four component parts, from east, from west, from south,
But God [is] the judge: he putteth down one, and setteth up another.
For in the hand of the LORD [there is] a cup, and the wine is red; it is full of mixture; and he poureth out of the same: but the dregs thereof, all the wicked of the earth shall wring [them] out,…
"For the cup is in the hand of the Lord, and the wine foams; it is fully mixed and he pours out of it, and all the wicked of the earth shall drain it down to its dregs." (Psalm 75:8)
But I will declare for ever; I will sing praises to the God of Jacob.
All the horns of the wicked also will I cut off; [but] the horns of the righteous shall be exalted.
